Crop Name: soybean

Profile
- Season type: short-season (TSUM total=1270 C.d)
- Temperature adaptation: temperate-adapted (TBASEM=7.00 C)
- Development driver: temperature + daylength (IDSL=1, DLO=14.00 h)
- Root/water trait: moderately deep-rooted, more drought-tolerant (RDMCR=120.00 cm, DEPNR=5.00)
- Assimilation trait: lower assimilation potential (AMAX peak=29.00)
- Storage allocation: mid storage allocation (FOTB onset DVS=1.15)

Nutrient capacity proxies (leaf maxima)
- NMAXLV: DVS0=0.0600, DVS1=0.0300
- PMAXLV: DVS0=0.0142, DVS1=0.0071
- KMAXLV: DVS0=0.0655, DVS1=0.0327

Use guidance
- Treat this as prior knowledge for zero-shot policy transfer.
- Final action should still adapt to current weather/soil observations.
